Name: Advance
Description: Move up to 5 steps in any direction, facing that direction.

Name: Arrow
Description: Deal 2 damage to the nearest unit in the facing direction.

Name: Attack
Description: Face a direction, then deal damage to an adjacent unit.

Name: Barricade
Description: Spawns 2 1-strength barricades adjacent to an existing unit or building.

Name: Bash
Description: Face a direction, then deal 2 damage and Stun an adjacent unit this turn.

Name: Battlefield Recruitment
Description: Spawn a 1-strength unit adjacent to a friendly unit, facing a chosen direction.

Name: Bear Trap
Description: Place a hidden bear trap adjacent to a friendly unit. Trigger: 2 damage and Snare for 2 turns; movement stops.

Name: Berserk
Description: Give a unit Strong and Undying this turn. It becomes Marked for Death.
Notes: Id: reinforce_berserk; Keywords: Priority; Cannot target barricades

Name: Blade Dance
Description: Chain 3 moves: each move 1 tile, then deal 1 to all adjacent units.

Name: Bleed
Description: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent tile and inflict Vulnerable for 2 turns.

Name: Blizzard
Description: Choose a tile. All units within 2 tiles take 2 damage and are Slowed for 2 turns.

Name: Bolster
Description: Give a unit Strong this turn.

Name: Boost
Description: Add 1 strength to up to two different units.

Name: Brain Freeze
Description: All opponent cards become Slow next turn. If a card would be both Priority and Slow, both cancel out.

Name: Burn
Description: Apply Burn to a unit (stackable; deals 1 damage per stack at end of each turn).

Name: Chain Lightning
Description: Deal 2 damage to a random adjacent unit, then jump to random adjacent units until no new targets remain.

Name: Charge
Description: Face a direction, move up to 5 tiles, then deal 3 damage to the tile in front.

Name: Cleave
Description: Deal 2 damage to the nearest tile in the forward, left and right directions.

Name: Converge
Description: Every friendly unit moves 1 tile toward a chosen tile and faces the moved direction.

Name: Coordinated Attack
Description: All friendly units deal 2 damage to the tile in front of them.

Name: Dash
Description: Move 1 or 2 steps forward.

Name: Disarm
Description: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent tile and inflict Disarmed for 2 turns.

Name: Dispel
Description: Remove all buffs and debuffs from a target unit.

Name: Divination
Description: Draw 3 extra cards next turn.

Name: Double Steps
Description: Move 2 different friendly units 1 tile each.

Name: Execute
Description: Destroy a non-leader unit in front. Leaders take 3 damage instead.

Name: Explosive Trap
Description: Place a hidden explosive trap adjacent to a friendly unit. Trigger: 3 damage; does not stop movement.

Name: Fireball
Description: Face a direction, then deal 2 damage to the first unit in line and all adjacent tiles around it.

Name: Flame Thrower
Description: Spew flames forward up to 3 tiles, dealing 2 damage to every unit in line.

Name: Harpoon
Description: Deal 1 damage to the first unit forward, then pull it toward you.

Name: Ice Bolt
Description: Face a direction, then deal 2 damage to the first unit in line and Slow it for 2 turns.

Name: Invest
Description: Permanently increase your action budget by 1.

Name: Jab
Description: Face a direction, then deal 2 damage to an adjacent unit.

Name: Joint Attack
Description: Choose a tile adjacent to a friendly unit. That unit and each other adjacent friendly unit face that tile and deal 2 damage to it.

Name: Lightning Barrier
Description: Give a unit a lightning barrier that deals 1 damage to adjacent enemies at the end of each turn.

Name: Lightning Strike
Description: Deal 1 damage to any unit on the board.

Name: Mark
Description: Target an enemy unit. All allied units move 1 tile toward it.
Notes: Id: spell_roguelike_mark; Counts as: movement; Roguelike only

Name: Mass Boost
Description: All friendly units gain +2 strength.

Name: Meteor
Description: Deal 5 damage to a chosen tile and 2 damage to adjacent tiles (units only). Slow

Name: Pack Hunt
Description: Alpha wolf only. Move 1 tile in any direction, then attack the tile in front for each allied unit adjacent to that tile.
Notes: Id: attack_roguelike_pack_hunt; Counts as: movement; Roguelike only

Name: Petrify
Description: Target unit is Stunned for 2 turns.

Name: Pincer Attack
Description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy units fully surrounded by friendly units.

Name: Pivot
Description: Change a unitâ€™s facing to any direction.

Name: Quick Boost
Description: Increase a unit strength by 1.

Name: Quickstep
Description: Take one step in the forward direction.

Name: Rage
Description: Give a unit Vulnerable and Strong indefinitely.

Name: Raise
Description: Choose the necromancer and an adjacent tile. Spawn a 2-strength skeleton there.
Notes: Id: spell_roguelike_raise; Roguelike only; Cannot target barricades

Name: Recruit
Description: Add a 1-strength unit to a spawning tile facing any direction.

Name: Roundhouse Kick
Description: Face a direction, then kick an adjacent unit back up to 3 tiles. Deal 2 damage after the push, or 5 if it collides with another unit.

Name: Shove
Description: Push an adjacent unit backwards 1 tile. If occupied, deal 3 damage to both.

Name: Shrug Off
Description: Remove all debuffs from a unit and give it Undying this turn.

Name: Slow Attack
Description: Face a direction, then deal heavy damage to an adjacent unit.
Notes: Id: attack_roguelike_slow; Keywords: Slow; Roguelike only

Name: Snare
Description: Target unit can't move for 4 turns.

Name: Spikes
Description: A unit reflects 1 damage back to its attacker for 2 turns.

Name: Split
Description: Split a unit into two identical units. Each keeps half the original strength, rounded up.
Notes: Id: reinforce_roguelike_split; Roguelike only; Cannot target barricades

Name: Step
Description: Move 1 step in any direction, then face any direction.

Name: Stomp
Description: Deal 1 damage and Stun all adjacent units for the rest of the turn.

Name: Strafe
Description: Move 1, 2, or 3 steps in any direction.

Name: Strike
Description: Face any direction, then deal damage equal to unit strength to the nearest tile.

Name: Tandem Movement
Description: A unit and all adjacent friendly units move up to 3 tiles in one direction.

Name: Teleport
Description: Teleport to any unoccupied tile within 3 tiles. Does not move through intermediate tiles.

Name: Thunderstorm
Description: Cast Chain Lightning from every friendly unit.

Name: Train
Description: Add 3 strength to an existing unit on a spawning tile.

Name: Trip
Description: Target unit can't move for 2 turns.

Name: Volley
Description: A unit and all adjacent friendly units each deal 1 damage to a chosen tile within 2 tiles.

Name: Whirlwind
Description: Deal 3 damage to surrounding units and push them back 1 tile if possible.
